title: juncus bufonius var. sorrentinoi
intro: Juncus bufonius var. sorrentinoi, also known as Sorrentino's marsh rush, is a variety of Juncus bufonius, a type of flowering plant in the family Juncaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine, particularly in the Mediterranean region, due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Juncus bufonius var. sorrentinoi include its potential to treat skin conditions, wounds, and respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs. Herbal preparations of Juncus bufonius var. sorrentinoi include infusions, decoctions, and salves, which can be used topically to soothe skin irritations and promote wound healing.
